summary: Phase B testing complete. All 17 features tested: Fast-Track (4/4), Telegram (4/4), Split Payment (6/6), Edge Cases (2/2), Full Flow (1/1). 14 automated tests passed, 3 skipped due to flight search timing. Manual verification confirmed all skipped features work correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health shows telegram status: stub
Fast-Track: Returning user (+22990000001) with payment_methods gets payment_fasttrack state after flight selection
Fast-Track: Accept (option 1) skips to awaiting_payment_confirm with correct driver (celtiis_cash)
Fast-Track: Decline (option 2) shows full payment menu (awaiting_payment_method) with 4 options
Fast-Track: New user (no payment history) gets awaiting_payment_method directly (no fast-track)
Telegram: POST /api/telegram/webhook processes Telegram update format and returns ok=True
Telegram: /start command maps to 'bonjour' (triggers awaiting_consent for new user)
Telegram: Simulate with channel=telegram creates session correctly
Telegram: Shadow profile gets telegram_id linked via webhook
Telegram: Full flow via simulate with channel=telegram works (consent → enrollment)
Split Payment: Typing 'split' at awaiting_payment_method triggers split mode
Split Payment: After selecting mobile money, state is split_payer_count
Split Payment: Payer count validation works (2-5 only, rejects 1 and 6)
Split Payment: Reconciliation fee calculated correctly (4 EUR for 3 payers = 2 extra × 2 EUR)
Split Payment: Phone numbers collected and validated (booker + co-payers)
Split Payment: Full flow to confirmation works - booking status = confirmed
Split Payment: All payers get payment initiated in MOCK mode (CELT-SIM-* references)
Split Payment: Shadow profile updated with travel_history, payment_methods, trusted_payers
Split Payment Edge Case: 2 payers = 2 EUR reconciliation fee
Split Payment Edge Case: 5 payers = 8 EUR reconciliation fee
critical_code_review_comments: Fast-Track logic correctly checks shadow profile payment_methods and offers last used method
Telegram webhook correctly processes update format, maps /start to bonjour, and creates sessions
Split payment flow correctly validates payer count (2-5), collects phone numbers, and calculates reconciliation fee
Split payment polling correctly waits for all payers and confirms booking when all succeed
Shadow profile correctly updated with trusted_payers after split payment success
All payment drivers remain in MOCK mode as specified (Celtiis Cash, MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Stripe)

mocked_apis.note: All payment drivers are in MOCK mode as specified in requirements
mocked_list: Celtiis Cash - MOCK mode (returns CELT-SIM-* references, SUCCESSFUL on status check)
Telegram Bot - STUB mode (bot token is placeholder, messages logged only)
WhatsApp Cloud API - Token invalid (messages logged only)
Duffel GDS - SANDBOX mode (real sandbox flights)

test_credentials: No auth required. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message, channel?, chat_id?}. API Base URL: https://voice-travel-booking.preview.emergentagent.com. For fast-track test, use +22990000001 (has shadow profile with payment_methods=['celtiis_cash']). For Telegram, use phone format +tg{number} with channel=telegram.
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers: +22990000001 (returning user with payment history), +22990PHASEB* (new users), +22990SPLITNEW* (split payment bookers), +22997* (split payment co-payers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B testing complete (Iteration 11). All features verified: (1) Fast-Track: returning users with payment_methods get payment_fasttrack state, accept skips to payment confirm, decline shows full menu, new users go directly to payment method. (2) Telegram: webhook processes updates, /start maps to bonjour, channel=telegram in simulate works, shadow profiles get telegram_id linked. (3) Split Payment: 'split' triggers flow, payer count validated (2-5), reconciliation fee = 2 EUR per extra payer, phone numbers collected and validated, full flow to confirmation works in MOCK mode, shadow profiles updated with trusted_payers. All payment drivers remain in MOCK mode. WhatsApp token is invalid (expected - use /api/test/simulate for all testing).
